mapper.select: SELECT ATTENDANCE_ID AS attendanceId, EMPLOYEE_ID AS employeeId, WORK_DATE AS workDate, CHECK_IN_TIME AS checkInTime, CHECK_OUT_TIME AS checkOutTime, ATTENDANCE_STATUS AS attendanceStatus FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} AND DATE_FORMAT(WORK_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{today}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (EMPLOYEE_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN_TIME, ATTENDANCE_STATUS) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{today}, #{checkInTime}, #{status})
INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (EMPLOYEE_ID, WORK_DATE, ATTENDANCE_STATUS) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{workDate}, 'LEAVE') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ATTENDANCE_STATUS = 'LEAVE'
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(a.ATTENDANCE_ID, 0) AS ATTENDANCE_ID, e.EMPLOYEE_ID, a.WORK_DATE, a.CHECK_IN_TIME, a.CHECK_OUT_TIME, a.ATTENDANCE_STATUS, e.EMPLOYEE_NO, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME, d.DEPT_NAME, p.POSITION_NAME FROM EMPLOYEE e LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE a ON a.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID AND a.WORK_DATE = #{data} LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = e.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON p.POSITION_ID = e.POSITION_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.POSITION_RANK, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (EMPLOYEE_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN_TIME, CHECK_OUT_TIME, ATTENDANCE_STATUS) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CHECK_IN_TIME = #{checkInTime}, CHECK_OUT_TIME = #{checkOutTime}, ATTENDANCE_STATUS = #{status}
